verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in a siangtho biak kikhopnate hi, ci-in na gen ding uh keimah Topa' pawi a kisehte hih bang ahi hi

Ni guk sungin nasep kizo ding a, ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath, a siangtho kikhopna ahi hi. Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen note' ten'na khempeuhah Topa-a' dingin Sabbath ahi hi
“Hihte pen amaute-a' dingin a kiseh hunin note in na gen ding uh ahi Topa' pawi a kisehte, a siangtho biak kikhopnate ahi hi
“A kha masa, a ni sawmleli nitak pen Topa' Paisan Pawi ahi hi
Tua kha mah, a ni sawmlenga ni pen Topa' tungah silngo sawhloh anlum pawi ahi hi. Ni sagih sung note in silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi
A ni masa ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi
Ahih hangin note in Topa' tungah meihal biakna ni sagih sung na pia ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi ding a, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note tungah ka hong piak leitangah note tungin an na lak uh ciangin, note in an na lakna uhah anpal lom khat, siampipa kiangah na paipih ding uh hi
Note hong kisan' theihna dingin amah in Topa' mai-ah anlom vei ding a, Sabbath ni a zing ciangin siampipa in tua anlom vei ding hi
Note in anlom na vei ni-un, Topa' tungah meihal biakna-in a sitbaanglo kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat na pia ding uh hi

Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding an tawh biakna pen sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi ding a, a gim namtui dingin Topa' tungah meihal biakna-in kipia ding hi. Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding leenggahzu tawh biakna pen leenggahzu thawl khat hi ding hi

Note in na Pasian uh biakna na paipih ma, hih ni matengin anlum hita leh a ki-em an hita leh a sial hita leh na ne kei ding uh hi; tua pen note' khang tawntungin na ten'na khempeuh uhah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi
“Note in Sabbath khit a zing ciang, vei-a biakna anlom na paipih ni uha kipan nipikal sagih bit dong a ni na simto ding uh hi
A Sabbath sagihna khit a zing ciangdong ni sawmnga dong na simto ding uh a, tua ciangin note in Topa' tungah an thak tawh biakna na paipih ding uh hi
Note in na ten'na uh panin vei dingin an lawh nih a kibawl anlum nih nong paipih ding uh hi. Tuate pen annel a kibawl, silngo sawhin a ki-em, Topa' tungah anpalin a kipia hi ding hi

Note in anlum tawh, a sitbaanglo kum khat a pha tuuno sagih, leh bawngtalno khat, leh tuutal nih na pia ding uh hi. Tuate, Topa' tungah a gim namtui mei tawh kihal biakna dingin an tawh biakna leh leenggahzu tawh biaknate tawh Topa' tungah meihal biakna hi ding hi
Note in khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat leh thunuama biakpiakna-in kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nih na pia ding uh hi
Siampipa in Topa' mai-ah vei-a biakna-in anpal-anlum leh tuuno nih tawh tuate vei ding a, tuate pen siampipa-a' dingin Topa' mai-ah a siangtho hi ding hi

Note in tua ni mahin thu zaksakna na bawl ding uh a, a siangtho kikhop khat na nei ding uh hi. Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi; tua pen note' ten'na khempeuhah na khang tawntungun ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi

“Note in na leitang panun an na lak uh ciangin, na lonawl dongun la loin, an na lak khit uh ciangin a sangte zong na khawm kei ding uh a, mizawngte leh khualmi-a' dingin tuate na nusia ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A kha sagihna, a ni masa ni-in note in a thupi tawlngakna ni khat, peengkul aw tawh a kitaangko phawksakna, a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi
Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh a, Topa' tungah meihal biakna na paipih ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Hih a kha sagihna ni sawm ni pen kilemna ni ahi hi. Tua pen note-a' dingin a siangtho kikhop hun hi ding a, note in an tangin, Topa' tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi
Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah note-a' dingin kilemna bawlna dingin kilemna bawl ni ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in bang khat peuhpeuh a nekha mi peuhmah ama mite kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi
Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah keimah in ama mite lak panin ka that ding hi
Note in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun na ten'na khempeuh uhah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi
Tua pen note-a' dingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi ding a, an na tang ding uh hi. Tua kha ni kua nitaka kipan, a nitak panin a nitak kik dong note in na Sabbath uh na tang ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih kha sagihna a ni sawmlenga ni-a kipan ni sagih sung pen Topa-a' ding buk pawi ahi hi
A ni masa ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi ding a, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi

Ni sagih sung note in Topa' tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh a, a ni giat ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat nei-in, Topa' tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tua pen a thupi kikhopna khat hi a, note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi

“Hihte pen Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakna leh an tawh biaknate, biakpiakna leh leenggahzu tawh biaknate, amau' ni ciatin piak dingin a siangtho kikhopna hunin na gen ding uh, Topa' pawi a kisehte ahi hi
Note in Topa' tungah na piak uh Topa' Sabbath-te, note' letsongte, thuciamna hangin na biaknate khempeuh uh leh utthu-a na biaknate khempeuh uh banah piak ding ahi hi

“Note in leitanga piangte na kaihkhop khit uh, kha sagihna, a ni sawmlenga ni-a kipan ni sagih sung Topa' pawi na bawl ding uh hi. A ni masa ni pen a thupi tawlngakna khat hi a, a ni giat ni zong a thupi tawlngakna khat mah hi ding hi
Note in a ni masa ni-in singkung hoih gahte, nisuh hiangte, a teh tam singhiangpite, leh lui-a gialhekte la-in, Topa na Pasian uh pahtawina, ni sagih sung pawi na bawl ding uh hi
Note in tua pen kum simin ni sagih sung pawi-in na nei ding uh a, note' khang tawntungin ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi. Note in kha sagihna sungah na bawl ding uh hi
No Israel mi khempeuh ni sagih sung buk sungah na teng ding uh hi
Tua pen keimah in Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiatpih lai-in Israel mite, buk sungah ka ten'sakna thu note' suanlekhakte in a theihna ding uh ahi hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Tu-a bangin Moses in Israel mite tungah Topa' pawi a kisehte a gen hi.
